options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: lottery_pool_mode
options.description:
Changes how the Lottery Trophy pool works.
Vanilla: The lottery pool expands when meeting the vanilla requirement. The 200 VS trophies are unlocked with 5 matches instead.
Progressive: The lottery pool will increase every time you get a Progressive Lottery Pool item.
Non-progressive: The lottery pool has specific upgrade items

options.name: starting_character
options.description: This is the character you will start with.

options.name: trophies_required
options.description: How many Trophies need to be found to complete the seed.

options.name: extra_trophies
options.description: How many extra Trophies will be in the item pool. Total trophies cannot exceed 293.

options.name: bonus_checks
options.description: Enables Bonuses as checks. Which bonuses are enabled can be tweaked.

options.name: target_checks
options.description: Enables a check for every individual character's Target Test being cleared.

options.name: ten_man_checks
options.description: Enables a check for every individual character clearing 10-Man Melee

options.name: event_checks
options.description:
Enables all Event match clears as checks. If this is disabled, events
with major unlocks will still give checks.

options.name: enable_rare_pokemon_checks
options.description: Enables 2 checks for seeing Mew and Celebi as well as 2 related Bonus checks.

options.name: enable_hard_bonuses
options.description: Enables a few specific difficult Bonus checks. Does nothing with Bonus-sanity off, such as All Variations or bonuses which are easier with 2 human players.

options.name: enable_extreme_bonuses
options.description: Enables a few very difficult Bonus checks, such as Hammer Throw or No-Damage Clear. Does nothing with Bonus-sanity off.

options.name: enable_annoying_multiman_checks
options.description: Enables checks on 15-Minute and Cruel Melee

options.name: diskun_trophy_check
options.description: Enables a check on the Diskun trophy, which requires getting all 249 Bonuses.

options.name: mewtwo_unlock_check
options.description: Enables a check on unlocking Mewtwo, which requires 1 total hour of VS play.

options.name: vs_count_checks
options.description: Enables checks on VS match counts. WARNING. These are really high and will likely take a long time.

options.name: hard_modes_clear
options.description: Enables checks for completing the main 1-P Modes on Hard or higher.

options.name: long_targettest_checks
options.description: Enables Target Test checks locked behind most or all characters.

options.name: goal_giga_bowser
options.description:
If enabled, you will need to defeat Giga Bowser in Adventure Mode and collect your required trophies to win.
This option can stack with other Goals.

options.name: goal_crazy_hand
options.description:
If enabled, you will need to defeat Crazy Hand in Classic Mode and collect your required trophies to win.
This option can stack with other Goals.

options.name: goal_event_51
options.description:
If enabled, you will need to complete Event 51 and collect your required trophies to win.
This option can stack with other Goals.

options.name: goal_all_events
options.description:
If enabled, you will need to complete every event besides 51 and collect your required trophies to win.
This option can stack with other Goals.

options.name: goal_all_targets
options.description:
If enabled, you will need to complete Target Test with every character and collect your required trophies to win.
This option can stack with other Goals.

options.name: solo_cstick_smash
options.description: Enables the use of Smash Attacks with the C-Stick during 1-Player modes.

options.name: disable_tap_jump
options.description: Removes the ability to jump by tapping Up on the control stick.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
